common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to update one item_id for each call, but still can support updating multiple model_ids stock of the same item_id (If you need batch modification, please call multiple times)This API will update only "seller_stock".Whenever there is a promotion ongoing or upcoming, the total stock must be larger than or equal to real-time “reserved_stock” promotion stock (Please check v2.get_item_promotion API for more details). Items that are deleted will not be allowed to modify stock.

children.description: new stock info（Please notice that stock(including Seller Stock and Shopee Stock) should be larger than or equal to real-time reserved stock）
children.name: seller_stock

children.description: location id, you can get the location id from v2.shop.get_warehouse_detail api, if seller don't have any warehouse, you don't need to upload this field.
children.name: location_id

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: location id; This field and the stock field are returned in pairs
children.name: location_id

children.description: stock;This field is returned if seller stock is used in the request, and normal stock fields are not returned.
children.name: stock

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/product/update_stock?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "item_id": 1000,
    "stock_list": [
        {
            "model_id": 0,
     
            "seller_stock": [
                {
                    "location_id": "-",
                    "stock": 0
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: add reminder "Please use the seller_stock field instead, we will deprecate this field in the future."
